title: Research Use Only
introduction: VarLens is a research analysis tool designed for the exploration of genomic variant data. Before proceeding, please be aware of the following important limitations.

limitations.title: Not for Diagnostic Use
limitations.text: This tool is intended for research purposes only and has not been validated for clinical diagnostic use. Results must not be used for medical decision-making.

limitations.title: Independent Verification Required
limitations.text: All findings and classifications should be independently verified using validated methods before being considered in any context.

limitations.title: No Doctor-Patient Relationship
limitations.text: Use of this tool does not establish a doctor-patient or clinician-subject relationship. No medical advice is provided.

limitations.title: Data Limitations
limitations.text: Variant annotations may contain artifacts, incomplete data, or errors inherent in reference databases. Pathogenicity classifications are informational only.

limitations.title: Professional Expertise Required
limitations.text: Interpretation of genomic variant data requires appropriate training in genetics and genomics. This tool is designed for use by qualified researchers.

footer: By continuing, you acknowledge these limitations and agree to use VarLens for research purposes only.
